DEFT ADDED TO CAL TO ADDRESS VIOLATION OF SCRAM PER SHERIFF DEPT
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/ADPRS1:23152 (B) ON 01-05-09 AND 06-18-12 BOTH IN SAN MATEO COUNTY/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ120D/CTS:5/4019HALF/HD/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASEFINE OF $525 PLUS $1589 IN ASSESSMENTSFORA FINE AMOUNT OF $2114,00,/MOP1/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:140/IID:1 YEAR/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/BE/

/CAL  MATTER FORTHWITH FROM DEPARTMENT FOR DISPO/CTORD  SCRAM BRACLET REQIREMENT CONDITION OF O,R, IS TERMINATED UNTIL DEFENDANT IS ADMITTED TO HOMEDETENTION IS ACCEPTED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: 1043 EC (BRADY) MOTION/NP/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL IS NOT PRESENT,/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: AT THE REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY   /

/CAL:PROCEEDINGS REGARDING VIOLATION OF SCRAM/DEF:WAS TAKEN INTO CUSTODY BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH VICAP/ /X:COURT RAISES BAIL (WITHOUT PREJUDICE):/BAIL:60,000/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLY WITH SCRAM WITHIN 24 HOURS IF HE BAILS OUT OF CUSTODY (THROUGH THE LCA OR SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT)/NTW/LD:12-02-13/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/VD:12-04-13 TO SET OR DISPO DATE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLY WITH ALCOHOL MONITORING THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/CONTD:STATUS AND PROOF OF ALCOHOL MONITORING/DOP/
/CAL TO SET/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 18/TRANS 18 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENSE'S MOTION TO SUPPRESSFILED,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS AND PROOF OF ALCOHOL MONITORING/DEF:HAS COMPLIED WITH SOBERLINK REQUIREMENT/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
